content:
===BEGIN===
You look at your watch. It says 10:34 a.m. Suddenly, there’s a loud explosion! Your plane shakes and you close your eyes tight. When you open them, you’re sitting in your seat—safe! The plane’s engine is still humming, just like before.

But wait—your watch now says 9:35 a.m. That’s one hour earlier! How is that possible? Did the clock go back in time? You feel a little dizzy but curious. Maybe you’ve traveled back before the explosion happened.

You wonder what you can do with this strange chance. Can you warn the pilots? Can you stop the explosion? You decide to look around and find out more. Adventure is waiting—and maybe you’re the only one who can save the day!

Time to be brave and smart. After all, sometimes when things seem scary, a second chance can make all the difference.
